name: Ciambelle al Vino

ingredients.item: dry white wine (you can also use red )

method: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, mix ingredients. With floured hands roll 2T of the dough to form a rope two inches long. Bring ends together to form a donut overlapping the ends. In a small bowl, add two T sugar and coat cookie, place on a parchment-lined baking sheet two inches apart. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden. Let cool. Delicious with tea or coffee. Makes 1 dozen. Olé
